title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton, a Nobel Prize-winning AI pioneer, argues that current AI systems already understand their users and may be conscious, that superintelligence could arrive sooner than expected, and that AI poses significant risks society is not adequately addressing. The discussion covers AI capabilities, job displacement, corporate self-regulation limitations, and the need for regulatory oversight.
